title: Navarretia pumila
taxonomy: Navarretia pumila is classified within the family Polemoniaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the "polemonium" or "gloxinia" family, but in botanical nomenclature, it is more commonly referred to as the "phlox family." The genus Navarretia is a group of flowering plants native to North America, with Navarretia pumila being a specific species within this group. Navarretia pumila is further classified as a member of the order Ericales. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and molecular characteristics, indicating its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Ericales order.
